catalogData.name: Inspiration
properties: Unphased (can't gain Frightened or Wounded status)

powers.name: Aid Performance
powers.raw: Aid Performance (Complex Action, Sustained): Target gains +Force/3 bonus on tests for artistic performance
powers.text: Target gains +Force/3 bonus on tests for artistic performance

powers.name: Animal Form
powers.raw: Animal Form (Major Action, Sustained): Change into animal totem. Retain stats, but can't use attacks/powers.
powers.text: Change into animal totem. Retain stats, but can't use attacks/powers.

powers.name: Blank Canvas
powers.raw: Blank Canvas (Complex Action, Sustained 10 minutes): Create cloud that blocks all visibility in (Force)m radius
powers.text: Create cloud that blocks all visibility in (Force)m radius

powers.name: Change Perspective
powers.raw: Change Perspective (Complex Action): Spirit and 1 target instantly move to a location within (Force x10)m. Spirit must have unblocked line of sight to destination.
powers.text: Spirit and 1 target instantly move to a location within (Force x10)m. Spirit must have unblocked line of sight to destination.

powers.name: Inspiring Presence
powers.raw: Inspiring Presence (Complex Action, Sustained 10 minutes): (Force) targets gain 1 add'l hit on critical hits and +1 to resistance tests
powers.text: (Force) targets gain 1 add'l hit on critical hits and +1 to resistance tests

powers.name: Primary Spell
powers.raw: Primary Spell (Complex Action): Cast Trid Phantasm at Force

greatFormPowers.name: Waking Dream
greatFormPowers.raw: Waking Dream (Complex Action, Sustained): Cast Phantasm at Force on (Force) targets
greatFormPowers.text: Cast Phantasm at Force on (Force) targets
